nasb.text: The son of Jediael was Bilhan. And the sons of Bilhan were Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish and Ahishahar.

esv.text: The son of Jediael: Bilhan. And the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, and Ahishahar.

cnv.text: 耶疊的兒子是比勒罕；比勒罕的兒子是耶烏斯、便雅憫、以忽、基拿拿、細坦、他施和亞希沙哈；

ccb.text: 耶叠的儿子是比勒罕，比勒罕的儿子是耶乌斯、便雅悯、以忽、基拿拿、细坦、他施和亚希沙哈。
